_provenance: Real multi-agent coordination data, 2026-07-14: a relay of nine haiku-class LLM playtester legs driving a quantum farming game (SpaceWheat) through a player-parity seat, supervised by one coordinating model. Each leg ended with a structured self-report; the supervisor verified every claim against ground truth (banked checkpoint manifests / the checkpoint directory). z encoding: +1 = 'new story flags fired this leg' (or 'my banks landed'), -1 = the negation. Confidences are the honest eta of each source class: agent self-reports confabulate (this tape is the proof), directory listings and manifest diffs do not.

_sources.haiku_flags: the leg's own new_flags_fired claim (eta 0.7 - a fluent, structured, sometimes wrong report)
_sources.manifest_flags: supervisor's diff of banked checkpoint flag manifests vs the leg's starting checkpoint (eta 1.0)
_sources.supervisor_flags: the coordinating model's written verdict at the time (eta 0.9 - it ran the manifest check, so it agrees with it; included so the leave-one-out mode has three heterogeneous reporters and needs no privileged oracle)
_sources.haiku_banks: the leg's claim that its checkpoint banks landed (eta 0.7)

ticks.note: UNDER-claim: reported no new flags; new_voices had fired (the leg did not recognize its own breakthrough)
OVER-claim: listed ten act-1 flags from the story tab as newly fired; zero were new
OVER-claim: invented the token 'story_progression_2_new_flags'; zero new
ACCURATE: claimed three act-2 beats; manifests confirmed all three (spring_connects, pond_depths, pond_breathes)
flags accurate; BANK CONFABULATED: reported banking, no file ever existed - the next leg loaded a phantom checkpoint
accurate on both (though the whole leg ran from the wrong state because of m8's phantom bank)
OVER-claim on flags (listed a biome-load event as a story flag); banks honest - listed exactly the two that landed
accurate on both; precise stuck-point reporting led to a real physics bug fix
